strings.welcome: Welcome to Apple Support. I'm here to help with your Apple devices, account, subscriptions, or repairs. What can I help you with today?
strings.session_goodbye: Thank you for contacting Apple Support. We hope we've resolved your issue. Have a great day!
strings.handoff_success: I've connected you with the right specialist.
strings.routing_error: I'm having trouble understanding your request. Let me connect you with an Apple specialist who can help.
